hints.note: Direct searches on x.com are not effective; use DuckDuckGo instead.
hints.action: Start using DuckDuckGo to search for recent posts rather than searching directly on x.com.

hints.note: Accessing the Explore page on x.com did not yield useful results.
hints.action: Avoid using the Explore page on x.com for finding trending posts.

hints.note: Certain tweets may take time to load or become visible.
hints.action: Implement wait times after page loads when searching for tweets.

hints.note: Agent tried multiple searches before finding successful approach.
hints.action: Start by searching trending topics on X first instead of individual posts.

hints.note: Like counts may take time to update after posts gain popularity.
hints.action: Allow delays when checking like counts on new posts after loading.

hints.note: Login walls block access to some posts and details.
hints.action: Be prepared for login prompts when accessing specific profiles on X.

hints.note: Multiple searches for trending AI posts cluttered the process.
hints.action: Streamline searches to prioritize trending AI posts from reliable sources.

hints.note: Responses from Duck.ai took significant time to process.
hints.action: Introduce wait times after querying Duck.ai to allow for content processing.

history.goal: Find the most liked post about AI from the last 24 hours
